---
title: "Jane Emily Gerard"
---

## Jane Emily Gerard

**Dates:** (1849-1905)

### Description

novelist as E. Gerard, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1894)

### Biography

Sister of Dorothea Gerard, she married (1869) Miecislaus de Laszowski; she lived in Austria.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
